items.caption:
What do you think of the final set up? ☁️🪞🎀🏹 we created a sleepover party for Mila that dreams are made of. I can’t believe our little girl is 10, where does the time go?! 🥹

#sleepoverparty #partyplanning #slumberparty #movienight #hostingtips

musicInfo.song_name: I Knew It, I Knew You

items.transcript: Love has ways of bringing things back to life. All you said was hi. And I remembered I loved you. Came back when it mattered. I saw you standing there in the light of the window wearing that same smile. Man, it's been a while. But I knew it, I knew you. I knew you.

items.caption:
You’ll never lose your suitcase again with tip #6! 🌍✈️ Save this before your next trip! I’ve used Samsonite suitcases for the last 10 years as I find they’re the best quality and durability. Their new Paralux range is amazing as it comes with packing cubes that fit the suitcase perfectly, dual access opening (so you can access your stuff quickly without fully unpacking!) and even a built-in AirTag holder! Such a clever and practical design! Which tip did you not know? @samsonite_au @luxury.escapes 

#packinghacks #packwithme #traveltips #travelhacks
items.transcript: Seven hacks that will change the way you pack forever. Pack your suitcase vertically to fit in more clothes and packing cubes are also a game changer to keep everything organized. Our Samsonite Parallax suitcase actually came with these packing cubes so they're a perfect fit. Stop toiletries leaking by placing cling wrap under the lid and place necklaces through a straw to prevent them tangling. Samsonite's Parallax range has dual access which means that you can access things right from the front of the case. Hide an air tag in your luggage so you always know where your bag is even if the airline doesn't. And stuff your shoes with socks or chargers to save space then store them in a separate compartment so nothing touches your clothes.

items.caption:
You’ll never lose a random pillowcase again with tip #2 🙌 which one will you try first? Hope these quick tricks were helpful lovelies xx 

#linencloset #linencupboard #tipsandtricks #hometips
items.transcript: Three tricks that will change the way you store your linen. We all know to store our sheet sets inside a pillowcase, but I like to turn the pillowcase inside out first, then fold the flap over to secure it into a space-saving bundle. Use office file racks to store extra pillowcases and grab them easily, and make Epsom salt and essential oil scent bags to make your linen smell amazing.

items.caption:
Work smarter, not harder 🌻 save these 5 easy cleaning hacks for your next home reset!
1. Place rice + lemon oil in your wardrobes to aborb moisture and keep mould away
2. To repel flies, place cloves inside a lemon and place this around your kitchen
3. Boil lemon, clove and vanilla to make your home smell amazing
4. Remove makeup stains instantly using shaving cream
5. And shaving cream is also amazing at cleaning mirrored appliances around the home

Hope these quick tips were helpful lovelies! Have an amazing weekend xx

#homehacks #hometips #cleaninghacks #cleaningtips #tipsandtricks
items.transcript: This is just that everyone should know, but no one ever teaches you. Place rice and lemon oil in your wardrobes to keep mold and moisture away. To repel flies, place cloves inside a lemon and place this around your kitchen. And you guys already know how much I love to boil lemon, clove, and vanilla to make your home smell amazing. Remove makeup stains instantly using shaving cream, and shaving cream is also amazing at cleaning mirrored appliances around the home.

items.caption:
You only need one pantry ingredient to make an all natural spider spray (without the harsh fumes!) 🕷️🕸️ this is one of my favourite natural spider hacks!

I’ve been using a simple salt water spray around my home, and I’ve found it helps keep spiders away. With Mila’s asthma, we try to avoid harsh aerosols where possible, so this is an easy, gentle alternative to harsh sprays that I’ve had good success with. Be mindful with use around marble and stone or any finish that doesn’t tolerate salt water. 

Have you ever tried this trick? I’d love to know if it worked for you too ♥️ 

#homehacks #spiderhack #cleaninghack #cleaningtips #mamamilastips
items.transcript: The next time you see a spider, try this. Fill a spray bottle with one cup of water and one teaspoon of salt. Salt water is an incredible all-natural spider spray. You can use this directly on bugs, or you can place it around your doors and windows to repel them from entering your home.

items.caption:
#3 makes the biggest difference to your hair 🙌 Fun fact, back when I was a teenager, I worked for 4 years at hairdressing salons and these are some of the tips I picked up along the way! I still use them to this day and they work so well 🙌 save this for your next salon appointment. Hope this was helpful lovelies xx hair by the lovely team at @uvasalon ♥️ 

#tipsandtricks #lifehacks #hairhack #hometips
items.transcript: Next time you visit your hairdresser, try these three tips. Before your visit, wash your hair with a clarifying shampoo. This helps remove buildup so you get the best color. I'm guilty of this one, but stop moving. Keep your nose facing the mirror during your haircut so your head stays level. And use a bond builder for your first four to six washes. This helps strengthen your hair and keeps it looking fresh.

items.caption:
Save these 5 tricks to make your next charcuterie + cheese board the best one yet 🧀 impress your guests with these simple tricks. Hope this was helpful lovelies xx

#cheeseboardtutorial #charcuterieboard #homehacks #hometips #tipsandtricks
items.transcript: Be my baby, be my baby now. I'll make you happy baby.

items.caption:
Tip 3 is the secret to making your home smell fresh 🌻 save this video for later!
1. Remove your fly screens, wash them then wipe them with peppermint oil to repel bugs + spiders entering your home. **Use discretion before use around pets**
2. A mix of equal parts citric acid, baking soda and hot water is amazing to clear and deodorise your drains
3. And don’t forget to wash your curtains yearly to remove hidden dirt and allergens (this is so overlooked but makes a big difference!)
Hope these quick tips were helpful lovelies xx

#homehacks #hometips #homefragrance #tipsandtricks #mamamilastips
items.transcript: Welcome back to hacks everyone should know but no one ever teaches you. Wipe your flyscreens with peppermint oil to repel bugs and spiders entering your home. A mix of citric acid, baking soda and hot water is amazing to clear and deodorize your drains. And don't forget to wash your curtains yearly to remove hidden dirt and allergens.

items.caption:
It’s amazing what a few simple changes can do. Which upgrade made the biggest difference: pressure washing, paint or greenery? 👇 Whether you’re planning a simple refresh or a major transformation, a personal loan from NOW Finance can help you bring your vision to life! @nowfinance 

#homerefresh #homerenovation #tipsandtricks #hometips #homesweethome
items.transcript: Let's do a full front door refresh because curb appeal is one of the simplest ways to add value to your home. Eventually, I want to paint these tiles, but for now, let's give them a good pressure wash. Next, a fresh coat of paint is a simple way to give your front door a makeover, especially if it's scuffed. If a refresh like this or a bigger transformation is on your wish list, a personal loan through Now Finance, an Aussie-owned non-bank lender, could give you the flexibility to bring your ideas to life. Finally, greenery along with beautiful pots bring height and a more welcoming feel. It makes one of the most biggest impacts, but it was a little costly. These little changes made our home feel so much more inviting before you even step inside.

items.caption:
So cosy I never want to leave ☁️ turning my bed into an actual cloud with @chillwithbonny 🤍 I’ve wanted to upgrade to their Winter doona for so long and have finally made the switch! After using it for about a month now I can safely say I’m obsessed x 

#bedroommakeover #bedroomdesign #cloudbedding #cloudbed #hometips
items.transcript: Baby boy, honey bee, gotta love the way you look at me, it's too hard to describe it

items.caption:
Do you have an overmount or undermount sink? It’s something we didn’t really think about when we renovated our kitchen, and it’s ended up being one of our biggest regrets! In hindsight, we’d consider financing to get that little extra budget for those features that add the most value to the home. NOW Finance makes borrowing simple to bring your dream home renos to life! @nowfinance 

#tipsandtricks #kitchenmakeover #hometips #homerenovation
items.transcript: This was our kitchen before, and this is it now. We love the result, but there are definitely a few things that we would change. We installed a mirror splashback because we're lucky to have an ocean view and we wanted to enjoy it while cooking. It looks amazing, but it does show every mark and needs constant cleaning. I wish we'd taken our cabinetry all the way to the ceiling. With our vaulted ceilings, budget held us back, but in hindsight, a personal loan could have given us the flexibility to do it properly, adding more storage and potentially more value to the home. Now, finance is an award-winning Aussie lender that makes borrowing simple so you can tick off those home renos or major purchases. We also didn't undermine our sink due to budget, but if I had my time again, this is definitely something I'd invest in. It just makes cleaning and everyday use so much easier.

items.caption:
Your clothes will smell incredible with tip #4 🙌 which trick will you try first? 
1. Simmer 1 sliced orange, 1 tbs coffee and vanilla to make your whole home smell incredible 
2. Place essential oil on cotton balls before vacuuming to deodorise your carpet 
3. And don’t forget to wash your cushion covers and throws fortnightly with liquid detergent to rid stale odours 
4. Place essential oil in Epsom salt in your wardrobe to help draw up moisture and freshen your clothes
5. Or you can place perfume or essential oil on furniture pads to keep your clothes smelling fresh

Hope these quick tips were helpful lovelies xx 

#tipsandtricks #homehacks #hometips #mamamilastips
items.transcript: Here are some more tricks to make your home smell amazing. You guys know how much I love to boil oranges, coffee and vanilla to make your whole home smell incredible. Place essential oil on cotton balls before vacuuming to deodorize your carpet and don't forget to wash your cushion covers and throws fortnightly to rid stale odors. Place essential oil and epsom salt in your wardrobe to help draw up moisture and freshen your clothes. Or you can place perfume on furniture pads to keep your clothes smelling fresh.

items.caption:
All you need is two pantry staples to make your flowers last for double as long 🌷 I’ve tried to many different methods, and this one is my go-to. It’s so easy and affordable but keeps your flowers fresh! Will you try this one? Hope it’s helpful lovelies xx 

#flowertips #tipsandtricks #lifehacks #mamamilastips
items.transcript: The next time you buy flowers, try this. Add two tablespoons of white vinegar to inhibit bacteria growth and two tablespoons of sugar to nourish the blooms. Trim the ends at a 45-degree angle and remove any excess foliage. I've tried so many different methods and this is the one that always works for me so you can enjoy your fresh blooms for longer.

items.caption:
Can you believe it’s been 6 years since I first shared this fold? 🕊️☁️ It’s such a simple way to elevate your self care and add some simple luxury to your home. It’s also perfect for guest bedrooms. Have you tried this one yet? ✨

#towelfolding #homehacks #hometips #homesweethome #mamamilastips
items.transcript: Have you ever wondered how luxury hotels get their towels looking so plush? Here's the trick. Fold one corner into a triangle, then fold it in half and flip the towel around. From the flat side, roll towards the pointed end, then tuck in that end. This fold is one of my favourites. It takes around 10 seconds to do and creates that little simple hotel moment at home.

items.caption:
Make your home smell magical 💫 this stovetop simmer is inspired by the wizarding world and leaves your home smelling so cosy and warm. Harry Potter: The Full-Cast Audio Editions are now on @audible_au and the series is so incredible
The full cast has big names, like Kit Harington and Keira Knightly and the amazing sound effects truly brings the story to life.
The full series is available for download now on the Audible app! #AD #audible
items.transcript: Will it be all right? You sound like Hagrid. It's a dragon, Hermione, it can look after itself. It's us we need to worry about. What do you mean? Well, I don't know how to break this to you, but I think they might have noticed we broke into Gringotts.
